entryPointCandidates.name: README.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Top-level project overview documenting the solution layout, local development prerequisites and commands, runtime notes (health/diagnostics endpoints, Azure behavior), testing strategy, and developer guidance.

entryPointCandidates.name: Program.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: ASP.NET Core host entry point: bootstraps Serilog, wires Azure Key Vault, OpenTelemetry, SignalR, Radzen, services, middleware, and maps all feature endpoints before running the Blazor Web App.

entryPointCandidates.name: Program.cs
entryPointCandidates.summary: Blazor WebAssembly entry point wiring up the HttpClient, Radzen UI services, and PoAppSession before running the host.

entryPointCandidates.name: New-AzureNamingStandardizationPlan.ps1
entryPointCandidates.summary: PowerShell tool that parses the embedded inventory JSON from the efficiency report and produces a CAF-derived naming/region standardization plan as CSV, Markdown, and a non-destructive remediation script.

entryPointCandidates.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Describes the four runtime layers of the solution (host, WASM client, shared contracts, infrastructure) and the Azure reporting flow from AzureReportService through AzureReportStore and diagnostics endpoints to the hidden /azure dashboard.

documentation.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
documentation.summary: Describes the four runtime layers of the solution (host, WASM client, shared contracts, infrastructure) and the Azure reporting flow from AzureReportService through AzureReportStore and diagnostics endpoints to the hidden /azure dashboard.

documentation.name: CONVENTIONS.md
documentation.summary: Coding conventions for the project covering feature/infrastructure layout, immutable shared models, async and cancellation patterns, input validation, opt-in destructive Azure operations, and UI styling tokens.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Top-level project overview documenting the solution layout, local development prerequisites and commands, runtime notes (health/diagnostics endpoints, Azure behavior), testing strategy, and developer guidance.

documentation.name: STACK.md
documentation.summary: Enumerates the technology stack: .NET 10 / C# 14, ASP.NET Core with Blazor WebAssembly, Radzen.Blazor, Azure SDKs, Serilog/OpenTelemetry, and the xUnit/Playwright test tooling.

documentation.name: TESTING.md
documentation.summary: Describes the testing strategy across unit, integration (WebApplicationFactory in the Testing environment), and Playwright E2E tests, plus required build verification and runtime checks for browser-facing changes.

documentation.name: azure-naming-standardization-plan.md
documentation.summary: Generated Markdown report listing the proposed CAF-derived naming/region baseline and a per-resource-group migration table mapping current resources to standardized targets and actions.

documentation.name: config-inventory.md
documentation.summary: Design note proposing an Azure custom config audit page, covering problem statement, recommended direction, MVP scope, and open questions.

infrastructure.name: deploy.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys the .NET 10 Blazor app to Azure App Service on push to master, using OIDC authentication and a protected 'production' environment.

infrastructure.name: build-and-deploy
infrastructure.summary: Single CI/CD job that validates deploy targets, restores, builds, and publishes the solution, then authenticates to Azure via OIDC and deploys the published artifacts to Azure App Service.

infrastructure.name: docker-compose.yml
infrastructure.summary: Docker Compose definition running an Azurite container that emulates Azure Blob, Queue, and Table Storage on ports 10000-10002 for local development and integration tests, backed by a named volume.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.sln
config.summary: Visual Studio solution file aggregating the host, client, shared, infrastructure, and three test projects (unit, integration, E2E) with their build configurations.

config.name: global.json
config.summary: Pins the .NET SDK to version 10.0.300 with latestMinor roll-forward, ensuring consistent build tooling across environments.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.csproj
config.summary: ASP.NET Core Web SDK project file for the host server; references the Shared, Client, and Infrastructure projects and pulls in Blazor WASM hosting, Radzen UI, Serilog, OpenTelemetry/Azure Monitor, OpenAPI/Scalar, and Azure Key Vault/Identity packages.

config.name: appsettings.json
config.summary: Base runtime configuration for the host server covering Serilog logging, allowed hosts/origins, Azure Table Storage, Application Insights, feature flags, Azure OpenAI, GitHub, the service pinger, incidents, and Key Vault settings.

config.name: appsettings.Development.json
config.summary: Development environment overrides for the host server, adjusting logging levels, Serilog, Key Vault, Azure Table Storage, feature flags, and Application Insights for local debugging.

config.name: azure.yaml
config.summary: Azure Developer CLI (azd) project configuration declaring the project name, metadata, infra provider, and service definitions for deployment.

config.name: Directory.Build.props
config.summary: Solution-wide MSBuild properties applied to every project, setting shared build settings such as target framework, nullable, and language version.

config.name: Directory.Packages.props
config.summary: Central Package Management manifest pinning NuGet package versions for all projects in the solution.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Client.csproj
config.summary: Project file for the Blazor WebAssembly client, declaring the WASM SDK and package references such as Radzen.

config.name: apps.json
config.summary: Static portfolio data file listing the catalog of applications (name, status, description, URL, technologies, GitHub repo) rendered by the client portfolio UI.

config.name: azure-full-report.json
config.summary: Large pre-generated snapshot of the Azure inventory report (web services, costs, SSL expiry, config drift, storage, AI services, downtime diagnoses, plan recommendations) served statically as the dashboard fallback dataset.

config.name: staticwebapp.config.json
config.summary: Azure Static Web Apps configuration defining SPA navigation fallback, MIME type mappings for WebAssembly assets, and global response headers.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure.csproj
config.summary: Project file for the Infrastructure library declaring Azure SDK, Table Storage, and related package references.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared.csproj
config.summary: Minimal project file for the Shared library containing cross-cutting models and result types.

config.name: launchSettings.json
config.summary: Visual Studio / dotnet launch profiles defining environment variables and application URLs for running the Blazor host locally.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: NPM manifest for the Playwright E2E test project declaring test scripts and the @playwright/test dev dependency.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the Playwright E2E test project.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Integration.csproj
config.summary: MSBuild project file for the integration test assembly declaring test SDK, xUnit, and project references.

config.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Unit.csproj
config.summary: MSBuild project file for the unit test assembly, declaring the test SDK, xUnit and FluentAssertions packages, and project references to the code under test.

list.name: Client UI Layer
list.description: Blazor WebAssembly front end: pages, layout/shared components, the Azure operations dashboard, client session state, CSS, and static client assets.

list.name: API & Host Layer
list.description: ASP.NET Core host exposing minimal-API endpoints (Health, Diag, GitHub, Infra, Pinger), the SignalR refresh hub, Blazor server shell, global exception middleware, and the Program.cs entry point.

list.name: Infrastructure Services Layer
list.description: Azure integration adapters (report, pinger, incident, downtime, plan recommendation, raw services), Key Vault secret management, and telemetry.

list.name: Shared Contracts Layer
list.description: Cross-project models and contracts shared by host, client, and infrastructure, including Result<T>, Azure report models, and user-session types.

list.name: Testing Layer
list.description: xUnit unit tests, WebApplicationFactory/Azurite integration tests, and Playwright end-to-end specs with their helpers and test configuration.

list.name: DevOps & Infrastructure
list.description: CI/CD pipeline, operational PowerShell scripts, Azure provisioning/identity scripts, and the docker-compose service definition.

list.name: Documentation
list.description: Project documentation covering architecture, conventions, stack, testing, and operational planning notes.

list.name: Configuration & Build
list.description: Solution, MSBuild props, project files, app settings, launch profiles, and static data/config JSON that define build and runtime configuration.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.name: _helpers.ts
file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.summary: Shared Playwright test helper that wires up page error and console listeners so specs can assert the absence of runtime JS errors.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.name: auth-model-lobby.spec.ts
file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.summary: Playwright end-to-end spec covering authentication, model selection, and lobby flows, using the shared error-collection helper to guard against runtime JS errors.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.name: pages.spec.ts
file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.summary: Playwright end-to-end spec verifying that the Home, Azure Dashboard, and Diag pages load without JS errors, return HTTP 200, hydrate the Blazor WASM client, and render correctly on mobile viewports.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.name: smoke-regressions.spec.ts
file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.summary: Playwright smoke and regression spec that exercises core application routes to catch broken pages and previously fixed defects, relying on the shared JS-error helper.

pipeline:.github/workflows/deploy.yml.name: deploy.yml
pipeline:.github/workflows/deploy.yml.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys the .NET 10 Blazor app to Azure App Service on push to master, using OIDC authentication and a protected 'production' environment.

step:.github/workflows/deploy.yml:build-.name: build-and-deploy
step:.github/workflows/deploy.yml:build-.summary: Single CI/CD job that validates deploy targets, restores, builds, and publishes the solution, then authenticates to Azure via OIDC and deploys the published artifacts to Azure App Service.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Partial class of the AzureDashboard page computing operational health reports, cost-watch items, and maintenance-refresh signals.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Partial class of the AzureDashboard page that derives the portfolio view: safe-to-remove candidates, consolidated services, priority queue, and resource inference heuristics.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Markup for the Azure operations dashboard page rendering fleet health, charts, portfolio tables, and detail tabs.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Primary code-behind for the AzureDashboard page handling report loading, SignalR-driven refresh progress, navigation guards, and lifecycle.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.name: AzureDashboard.Trends.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Partial class of the AzureDashboard page loading historical scan summaries and building time-series trend data for cost, uptime, and response history.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Landing/portfolio page that fetches the live Azure app inventory and renders it as a hero section plus a grid of portfolio app cards.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Data model record describing an Azure resource flagged as safe to remove, with its type, name, and removal reasons.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Data models for the portfolio view, defining AppsWrapper and AppModel records used to deserialize and render the app inventory.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Componen.summary: Tabbed detail section component for the Azure dashboard, rendering drill-down tables for services, costs, SSL, and trends.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/PoAppSes.summary: Client-side session service persisting user session state to browser localStorage via JS interop.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/Program..summary: Blazor WebAssembly entry point wiring up the HttpClient, Radzen UI services, and PoAppSession before running the host.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/WasmRend.summary: Defines a small static helper exposing the InteractiveWebAssembly render mode used to configure Blazor component interactivity in the client.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroo.summary: Static portfolio data file listing the catalog of applications (name, status, description, URL, technologies, GitHub repo) rendered by the client portfolio UI.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroo.name: azure-full-report.json
config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroo.summary: Large pre-generated snapshot of the Azure inventory report (web services, costs, SSL expiry, config drift, storage, AI services, downtime diagnoses, plan recommendations) served statically as the dashboard fallback dataset.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroot/.name: index.html
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroot/.summary: Root HTML host page for the Blazor WebAssembly client, loading the app stylesheet and the WebAssembly runtime bootstrap script.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroot/.name: helpers.js
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroot/.summary: Client-side JavaScript interop helpers providing a particle/background canvas animation and mouse-tracking pointer effects for interactive UI elements.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroo.name: staticwebapp.config.json
config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Client/wwwroo.summary: Azure Static Web Apps configuration defining SPA navigation fallback, MIME type mappings for WebAssembly assets, and global response headers.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: AzureReportService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Core orchestration service that builds the full Azure inventory report by discovering web services, resolving plans, gathering metrics, cost, SSL, config drift, storage/AI/log inventories, orphaned/zombie detection, burn rate, and downtime diagnoses.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: AzureReportStore.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Persistence layer that stores and retrieves Azure reports in Azure Table Storage, with gzip compression, history tracking, and automatic recovery of a missing table.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: DowntimeDiagnosisService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Diagnoses why broken/inactive web services are down by correlating ARM deployments, activity-log stop events, App Insights metrics, and GitHub workflow runs into per-service diagnoses.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: IncidentService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Detects service status transitions between report runs, records incidents to Azure Table Storage, optionally posts a webhook notification, and loads recent incidents.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: PlanRecommendationService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Analyzes services with their config drift and downtime diagnoses to produce prioritized App Service Plan upgrade/downgrade recommendations with cost estimates.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: RawService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Internal record describing a discovered Azure service before enrichment, with a mapping helper to the public WebService model.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: ServicePingerService.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Background hosted service that periodically pings all known service URLs, records up/down telemetry, and caches the latest ping snapshot.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: AppKeyVaultSecretManager.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Custom Key Vault secret manager that filters to an app-specific prefix and strips it when mapping secret names to configuration keys.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructur.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure.csproj
config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructur.summary: Project file for the Infrastructure library declaring Azure SDK, Table Storage, and related package references.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.name: Telemetry.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Infrastructure/.summary: Static OpenTelemetry meter and instrument definitions (counters/histograms) for Azure OpenAI, GitHub, pinger, and refresh metrics.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Ap.name: AppServicePlanInventory.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Ap.summary: Shared helper that builds an inventory of PoShared App Service Plans, filtering server farms and counting hosted apps per plan.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Az.name: AzureModels.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Az.summary: Shared record/DTO definitions for the entire Azure report domain (web services, metrics, cost, SSL, drift, inventories, diagnoses, recommendations) used across client and server.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Re.name: Result.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Azure/Re.summary: Generic Result<T> type encapsulating success/failure with value, error message, and optional exception for explicit error handling.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/PoPunk.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared.csproj
config:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/PoPunk.summary: Minimal project file for the Shared library containing cross-cutting models and result types.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Session/.name: PoUserSession.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware.Shared/Session/.summary: Minimal shared record modeling the persisted user session state.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/_Imports.razor.name: _Imports.razor
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/_Imports.razor.summary: Global Razor using-directive file importing common namespaces for the server host's Razor components.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/.azure/config.name: config
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/.azure/config.summary: Azure Developer CLI (azd) environment configuration file recording the active default Azure environment.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/api.http.name: api.http
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/api.http.summary: REST Client request collection for manually exercising the application's diagnostic, health, GitHub, and Azure API endpoints during development.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/App.razor.name: App.razor
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/App.razor.summary: Root Blazor host document defining the HTML shell, head outlet, stylesheet links, and the Routes component with WebAssembly render mode.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Azure/.name: PingerEndpoints.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Azure/.summary: Maps minimal-API endpoints that expose the background Pinger service snapshot and a toggle to enable/disable connectivity pinging.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/D.name: DiagEndpoints.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/D.summary: Defines the diagnostics API surface: serving the Azure efficiency report, triggering and cancelling background refresh runs over SignalR, and rendering the /diag HTML status page.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/H.name: HealthEndpoints.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/H.summary: Maps health-check and client-config endpoints, reporting application status, dependency checks, and a masked configuration snapshot.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/R.name: RefreshSessionManager.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Diag/R.summary: Singleton coordinating a single concurrent Azure report refresh run via a lock and a cancellable token source.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/GitHub.name: GitHubEndpoints.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/GitHub.summary: Maps GitHub activity endpoints that fetch repository activity, compute a health score, and cache results per repository.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Infra/.name: InfraEndpoints.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Features/Infra/.summary: Maps infrastructure-discovery endpoints that scan GitHub repositories for workflow and IaC files, parse them, and infer deployment topology.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Infrastructure/.name: GlobalExceptionHandler.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Infrastructure/.summary: Implements IExceptionHandler to convert unhandled exceptions into structured ProblemDetails responses with logging.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Infrastructure/.name: RefreshHub.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Infrastructure/.summary: SignalR hub that broadcasts Azure report refresh progress and completion events to connected dashboard clients.

file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Program.cs.name: Program.cs
file:PoPunkouterSoftware/Program.cs.summary: ASP.NET Core host entry point: bootstraps Serilog, wires Azure Key Vault, OpenTelemetry, SignalR, Radzen, services, middleware, and maps all feature endpoints before running the Blazor Web App.

config:PoPunkouterSoftware/Properties/la.name: launchSettings.json
config:PoPunkouterSoftware/Properties/la.summary: Visual Studio / dotnet launch profiles defining environment variables and application URLs for running the Blazor host locally.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.E2E.summary: Playwright E2E spec checking the /health endpoint returns a healthy status from the live server.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Int.summary: xUnit integration tests exercising health, config, diag-report, az-status, OpenAPI, static-file, and automation-script endpoints against an in-memory test host.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Int.summary: xUnit integration tests asserting API JSON responses use camelCase property naming across health, config, az-status, and diag-report endpoints.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Int.summary: xUnit integration tests for AzureReportStore persistence, covering empty-connection handling, save/load round-trips, history retention, and concurrent saves against Azurite.

file:tests/PoPunkouterSoftware.Tests.Uni.summary: xUnit unit tests for the GitHub activity endpoint covering validation, caching, rate-limit handling, and health-score computation with a stubbed HTTP handler.
